dvids.title: Norfolk Naval Shipyard Welcomes USS Gerald R. Ford for its First Planned Incremental Availability
dvids.desc: Norfolk Naval Shipyard (NNSY) in Portsmouth, Virginia welcomed USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) July 7 in advance of its Planned Incremental Availability (PIA).   Following the carrier’s historic 326-day deployment, including operations in the Mediterranean, Caribbean, and Red Seas, this marks Gerald R.

dvids.title: U.S. Forces Complete New Round of Retaliatory Strikes Against Iran
dvids.desc: U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) forces completed a new round of offensive strikes against Iran, July 7, hitting over 80 targets with precision munitions as an immediate response to Iran's latest attacks on commercial vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz. (U.S. Central Command Video)

dvids.title: U.S. Forces Complete New Round of Retaliatory Strikes Against Iran
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) forces completed a new round of offensive strikes against Iran, July 7, hitting over 80 targets with precision munitions as an immediate response to Iran's latest attacks on commercial vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

dvids.title: Mohammed VI, Niani Join Global Fleet on the Hudson
dvids.desc: Warships from Morocco and Senegal took their place in the multinational fleet assembled along the Hudson River July 4 as the reviewing ship transited the formation during International Naval Review 250.
dvids.unit_name: U.S. Naval Forces Europe-Africa/U.S. Sixth Fleet
